name: Chinese Egg Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soy sauce, water, mashed garlic, and lemon juice in a bowl.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Place the chicken quarters and pork tenderloin into the marinade, ensuring they are well coated.
4. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
6. Add celery stalks and sauté until slightly softened.
7. Add diced cabbage, onions, and mushrooms; cook until vegetables are tender.
8. Season the mixture with additional soy sauce, salt, and pepper.
9. Wrap bean sprouts in egg roll wrappers along with some of the vegetable mixture.
10. Roll up tightly and secure with toothpicks if needed.
11. Heat oil in a deep pan to 350°F (175°C).
12. Remove wrappers from bean sprouts using tongs and gently place them into the hot oil.
13. Fry until golden brown, turning occasionally to ensure even cooking.
14. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately.
